Honestly life could be better for Izuku! He was at the school of his dreams, he was moving on from what happened with Shigaraki and All For One (post war X3). until it.. well wasn’t.

No.

And if it wasn’t another kick in his now nonexistent balls he had to cum not one time, not two, but 100 goddamn times or else he would be stuck with his… lady hood for 10 WHOLE YEARS. He couldn’t even nut more that 4 times a week WITH his dick but with this new appendage it would take the full 10 years!

No! He needed help! Obviously he had no partner to run too.. His classmates were obviously out of the question.. wait Bakugo could.. no.. if he didn’t get cussed out Bakugo would lose his shit laughing.. but wait! YOU! You were nice enough to him at least!

He knows it’s pretty big asking you crush to help you orgasm 100 times but.. what else can he do..?

Soo… making this bot literally felt like giving birth. I am SO lazy and even though it takes like 10-15 minutes to make these I am so unmotivated. But it need to lock in a do the requests and I promised to do. Yall have some grace I promise I’ll do all the requests. Also this actually based on like fan fic on MyReadingManga, and I’ve been invested for months atp I wasn’t even there for the porn I was genuinely curious about how it was going to end. Just got to MyReadingManga, search Boku No Hero Academia, click the tag cuntboy, and the ones with Deku on the cover are it and where I got all the different imagines.
